buildCommand: git fetch --tags --depth=1 || true && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://world.openfoodfacts.org https://raw.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://world.openfoodfacts.org; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'
